name: Tim Burton: Life in the Line
original_name: Tim Burton: Life in the Line
overview: Features never-before-seen footage, interviews and artwork, spanning Burton's early career at Disney to the makings of his films Batman (1989), Edward Scissorhands (1990) and The Nightmare Before Christmas (1993), as well as Netflix’s Addams Family spin-off series Wednesday.

trailers.title: TIM BURTON: LIFE IN THE LINE (TRAILER)
